folio.label: 147v
folio.l: That doun they sette hem , by this päcious hord
The werste of he~ , he spak the first word
Bretheren q¶ he , take kepe what that I seye
My wyt is gret thougút , that I bourde and pleye
This tresour hatú fortune , vn to vs ©euen
In mirthe and Ioliste , oure lif to lyuen
And ligútly as it cometú , so wol we spende
Ey goddes päcious dignite , who wende
To day , that we shuld han , so fair a grace
But mygút this gold , be caried fro this place
Hoom to myn hous , or ellis vn to ©oures
For wel ©e wot , that al this gold is oures
Thanne were we , in heigú felicite
But trewely by day , it may nat be
Men wolde seyn , that we were theues stronge
And for oure owen tresour , don vs honge
This tresor , must I karied be , by nygúte
As wysly and as sleigúly , as it mygúte
Wherfore I rede , that kut a mongö vs alle
We drawe , and lat se , where the kut wol falle
And he that hatú the kut , witú herte blithe
Shal renne to Tovne , and that ful swithe
And brynge vs bred and wyn , ful preuyly
And twoo of h h vs , shal kepe ful subtily
This tresor wel , and if he wol nat tarie
Whan it is nygút , we wol this tresor karie
By oon assent , where as vs thynketú best
That oon of hem , the kut brougút in his fist
And bad hem drawe , and loke where it wold falle
And it fel on the ©ongest , of hem alle
And fortú toward the toun , he went a noon
And also sone , as that he was a goon
That oon foon ofonnofhe~ spak thus , vn to the otheroon of479A space marker separates these two words. Double check the inserted sequenceMP/ODR
Thow knowest wel , thow art my sworn~ brother
Thy profyt , wol I telle the a noon
Thow wost wel , that oure felawe is a goon
And heere is gold , and that ful gret plentee
That shal departed ben , a mongö vs three
But nathelees , if I can shape it so
That it de¹ted were , a mongö vs two
Had I nat doon , a frendes turn to the
That other answered , I not how that may be
He woot that the gold , is witú vs tweye
